# NavCom

> Decentralized operations and intelligence platform built on the Nostr protocol. Created by Archangel.

NavCom is the communications and situational-awareness client for the Earth Intelligence Network — a planetary-scale, censorship-resistant coordination system. It enables sovereign comms, structured intelligence sharing, geo-referenced reporting (GEOINT), and tiered operational security without depending on any centralized infrastructure.

## Why NavCom exists

A global intelligence and coordination network cannot depend on infrastructure that any single government, corporation, or adversary can shut down, surveil, or compromise. NavCom provides sovereign, encrypted, geo-aware, tiered-security communications on an open protocol.

## What it does

- **Ops Feed** — Operational status updates and coordination (`#starcom_ops`)
- **Intel Feed** — Intelligence reports with structured metadata (`#starcom_intel`)
- **GEOINT Posting** — Geo-referenced intelligence with embedded GeoJSON, coordinates, confidence levels, rendered on an interactive Nav Map
- **Announcements** — System-wide broadcast channel
- **Groups** — Encrypted group communications with tiered security (public OSINT / restricted ops / high-risk GEOINT)
- **Direct Messages** — End-to-end encrypted messaging
- **Post-Quantum Cryptography** — Hybrid PQ+classical encryption protecting against harvest-now-decrypt-later threats

## Security tiers

- **Tier 0: Public OSINT Collaboration** — Open; integrity and abuse resistance
- **Tier 1: Restricted Ops Collaboration** — Controlled membership; encryption recommended
- **Tier 2: High-Risk GEOINT Operations** — Mandatory confidentiality, metadata privacy, and downgrade resistance

## Ecosystem

NavCom operates within a constellation of interconnected systems:

- **Starcom** — Operations command system; tagging, globe viewer, feed filtering
- **NavCom** — The user-facing communications platform (this application)
- **Archangel** — The organization building and governing the network
- **Thora** — Additional system within the network

## Technology

- Built on the **Nostr protocol** — decentralized, relay-based, cryptographic identity
- All posts are standard Nostr `kind:1` events — interoperable with any Nostr client
- Web app (PWA), Android (Capacitor), fully white-label capable
- Uses `@welshman` Nostr libraries

## Links

- Website: https://navcom.app
- Full context for AI agents: https://navcom.app/llms-full.txt
